definitions.vendorAverageScore: arithmetic average of overallScore.calculatedScore for published-internal records only; no contract-value weighting in v1
definitions.tradeAverageScore: arithmetic average of published-internal records grouped by normalized trade/scope
definitions.vendorTrend: requires at least two published-internal records for same vendor; display direction only, not predictive claim
definitions.preferredPerformer: at least two published-internal scorecards >= 4.50 and no unresolved severe negative category
definitions.highRiskPerformer: one published scorecard below 2.50 or two published records with same category score below 2.50
definitions.inconsistentPerformer: published scorecards vary by >= 1.25 points across comparable projects/trades
definitions.recurringIssue: same category below 3.00 in two or more published records for same vendor or trade
definitions.portfolioConfidence: high if >=3 records and all have high/medium evidence confidence; medium if 2 records; low otherwise
